CONTENT.Career: Van Sas played at his hometown club USV Hercule until 2016. He then came through the academy at FC Utrecht. Van Sas joined Manchester City in 2020, as a 16 year-old. Without making a first team appearance he joined Feyenoord in his homeland in September 2023.
CONTENT.International career: In 2022, Van Sas was called up to the Dutch U19 side. He made his debut on the 21 September 2022 against Moldova under-19s.

SUMMARY: Mikki Avelon Leander van Sas (born 29 February 2004) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays for Feyenoord as a goalkeeper.
